# Disney After 60

> Disney vacations curated for travelers 60 and up. A focused offering from Travel Creations By Di.

## About
Disney After 60 is a niche travel service from Diane Mack of Travel Creations By Di, designed specifically for travelers aged 60 and up who want to experience Disney destinations with the right pace, comfort, and attention to detail.

## Sister Site
- Travel Creations By Di — https://travelcreationsbydi.com — full-service luxury travel curation

## Services (placeholder — finalize with brand kit)
- Walt Disney World — paced and detailed itineraries for the after-60 set
- Disney Cruise Line — selecting the right ship, stateroom, and itinerary
- Aulani — Hawaii Disney resort planning
- Adventures by Disney — VIP-guided group travel
- Multi-generational Disney trips with grandkids

## Audience
Travelers 60 and up. Frequent grandparent-grandchild dynamic. Priorities: comfort, pacing, accessibility, accommodations near transport, dining without long lines, and "we did Disney right" memories.

## Contact
- Email: diane@travelcreationsbydi.com
- Phone: (469) 248-6318
- Location: 110 Hideaway Circle, Ingram, TX 78025
- Parent agency: https://travelcreationsbydi.com
